securetrace 0.1.0

Trace Class

Source: R/trace.R
Trace.Rd

Trace Class

Trace Class

Value

An R6 object of class Trace.

Details

Root container for a full agent run. A trace contains multiple spans representing individual operations like LLM calls, tool executions, and guardrail checks.

Public fields

name

Name of the trace.

trace_id

Unique identifier for the trace.

metadata

Arbitrary metadata attached to the trace.

status

Current status: "running", "completed", or "error".

Active bindings

spans

List of child spans (read-only).

Methods

Public methods

  • Trace$new()

  • Trace$start()

  • Trace$end()

  • Trace$add_span()

  • Trace$duration()

  • Trace$to_list()

  • Trace$summary()

  • Trace$clone()

Method new()

Create a new trace.

Usage

Trace$new(name, metadata = list())

Arguments

name

Name for the trace.

metadata

Optional named list of metadata.

Returns

A new Trace object.

Method start()

Record the start time.

Usage

Trace$start()

Method end()

Record the end time and mark as completed.

Usage

Trace$end()

Method add_span()

Add a child span to this trace.

Usage

Trace$add_span(span)

Arguments

span

A Span object.

Method duration()

Get the total duration in seconds.

Usage

Trace$duration()

Returns

Numeric duration, or NULL if not started/ended.

Method to_list()

Serialize the trace to a list.

Usage

Trace$to_list()

Returns

A named list representation.

Method summary()

Print a formatted summary of the trace.

Usage

Trace$summary()

Returns

The trace summary as a character string, invisibly.

Method clone()

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

Usage

Trace$clone(deep = FALSE)

Arguments

deep

Whether to make a deep clone.

Examples

# Create and use a trace
tr <- Trace$new("my-agent-run", metadata = list(user = "test"))
tr$start()

# Add a span to the trace
span <- Span$new("llm-call", type = "llm")
span$start()
span$set_tokens(input = 100L, output = 50L)
span$end()
tr$add_span(span)

tr$end()
tr$status
#> [1] "completed"
tr$duration()
#> [1] 0.002712965
tr$summary()
#> Trace: my-agent-run (completed) ID: 6ada44bc15ee3f1285a6f4585e9f4103 Duration:
#> 0.00s Spans: 1 Tokens: 100 input, 50 output Cost: $0.000000

# Serialize to list for export
trace_list <- tr$to_list()
trace_list$name
#> [1] "my-agent-run"
